title: Regime Detection Output Specification v1.0
description: All Task #3 regime detection implementations MUST produce output files conforming to this specification. The evaluator (Task #4) will parse these files programmatically.

output_files.description: Each implementation produces TWO files in the evaluation-plan/outputs/ directory

regime_csv.description: CSV file with regime predictions for each trading day. One row per date. Sorted ascending by date.
regime_csv.format: CSV with header row, comma-delimited, UTF-8, no BOM, no quoting unless value contains comma

required_columns.name: date
required_columns.description: Trading date. Must match dates in sp500_ohlcv_5yr.parquet exactly.
required_columns.constraints: ISO 8601 date, no time component, sorted ascending, no gaps (include all trading days in the evaluation window)

required_columns.name: predicted_regime
required_columns.description: Predicted regime label. 0-indexed (first regime = 0). Must be contiguous integers starting from 0.
required_columns.constraints: 0 <= predicted_regime < num_regimes. Integer, no NaN, no negative values.

required_columns.name: confidence
required_columns.description: Confidence score for the regime assignment. 0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = maximum confidence. If your algorithm doesn't produce confidences, use 1.0 for all rows.
required_columns.constraints: 0.0 <= confidence <= 1.0. Float with up to 4 decimal places.

required_columns.name: transition_flag
required_columns.description: 1 if regime changed from previous trading day, 0 if same regime. First row in the file MUST have transition_flag=0.

optional_columns.name: regime_label
optional_columns.description: Human-readable regime name (e.g., 'bull', 'bear', 'sideways', 'high_vol'). Optional but recommended. If omitted, the evaluator will use 'regime_0', 'regime_1', etc.

optional_columns.name: regime_return_forecast
optional_columns.description: Optional: algorithm's expected return for this regime (daily, decimal, e.g., 0.0005 = 5bps). Used for advanced Sharpe scoring.

optional_columns.name: regime_vol_forecast
optional_columns.description: Optional: algorithm's expected volatility for this regime (daily, decimal).

metadata_json.description: JSON file describing the algorithm, its parameters, and provenance.

algorithm.description: Short algorithm name. Used as {algo_name} in filenames. Lowercase, underscores, no spaces.

algorithm_family.description: Broad algorithm category for stratified evaluation.

paper_reference.description: arXiv ID or DOI if implementing from a paper. null if original implementation.

num_regimes.description: Number of distinct regimes detected. Must match max(predicted_regime) + 1.

regime_labels_map.description: Mapping from predicted_regime integer to human-readable label. Keys are string integers ('0', '1', ...).
regime_labels_map.constraints: Keys must cover all regime integers 0..num_regimes-1.

parameters.description: Key algorithm parameters with their values. Free-form but must include at minimum: training_window_days (int or null for full-sample) and features_used (string array).

training_window_days.description: Number of calendar days used for training. null = trained on full sample (no walk-forward). If using expanding window, report the initial window size.

features_used.description: List of feature names used as inputs. Use standard names from the data dictionary below.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this output was generated.

output_spec_version.description: Version of this spec that the output conforms to.

feature_name_dictionary.description: Standard feature names for the features_used field. Use these exact names to ensure interoperability.

evaluation_window.description: All implementations must produce predictions for this exact date range (matching sp500_ohlcv_5yr.parquet). The first 252 trading days (~1 year) may have null/NaN predictions if using a training window, but rows must exist.

deliverable_checklist.description: Before submitting, T3 implementers must verify:
items: CSV has header row with all required columns
date column is sorted ascending with no gaps
transition_flag is 1 on the day regime changes, 0 otherwise
metadata JSON is valid and contains all required fields
No NaN values in required columns (use -1 or 999 for missing, documented in metadata)
